description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a skeletonized stock and a camouflage-patterned finish across its body. The receiver and barrel are constructed from what appears to be metal, while the stock and handguard are likely reinforced polymer or composite materials. The rifle includes a thumbhole stock for ergonomic handling and a long, slender barrel extending from the main body. Red accent components, possibly safety switches or fire selectors, are visible on both sides of the receiver. The top of the rifle appears to have a mounting rail, but no sighting system is attached. The overall build suggests a lightweight, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern rifle with a skeletonized, camouflage-patterned stock, red accent controls, and a long, slender barrel. The design is angular and tactical, with a thumbhole grip and no visible sighting system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, camouflage-patterned body, skeletonized stock, and red accent controls.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the symmetry of the rifle's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the thumbhole stock, camouflage finish, and red controls from the other side.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the flat upper surface, possible mounting rail, and the overall slimness of the rifle.
